title: Kick streamer DeenTheGreat faces felony charge over yacht party incident
summary_full: Kick streamer DeenTheGreat was arrested in Miami after a yacht party fight, facing felony attempted robbery charges. A woman alleged he tried to snatch her phone while she recorded him during an argument, with Ring footage reportedly corroborating the claim. The incident occurred during a livestream with boxer Adrien Broner, leading to Deen's disappearance from the stream and subsequent booking.
